name: Search results page
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete search-results page of a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; a prominent search field showing the current query; the result count; a list of results with titles, descriptions and content-type tags; pagination; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
